title: Topology Optimization (SIMP) — Nominal + Mismatch Specs

E.forward: K(rho)*u = f, C = f ** T u, rho_e in [rho_min, 1], penalty p=3
E.inverse: recover density field rho in [0 from compliance C = f ** T K(rho)^{-1} f (scalar objective)

d_spec_notes: Nominal spec anchored at domain-standard operating point; d_spec ~ 0.35 from any other registered spec.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Density field rho: N_e-dimensional; stiffness K: N_dof x N_dof; compliance C: scalar. Dimensional chain consistent.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: SIMP penalization ensures discrete 0/1 solutions in limit; volume constraint makes problem bounded; regularization via filter ensures existence.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: OC method converges to KKT under convexity of relaxed problem; MMA provides globally convergent sequence.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: compliance_ratio evaluated for 10 random Omega samples without error; OC baseline fails to reach epsilon at T4_blind.
